description: An IT auditor reviews who has administrator-level access to critical production servers.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all users with 'root' or 'administrator' access on all Tier 1 production servers.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor receives the list of privileged users.

nodes.task_description: Compare the access list against the job titles and roles of the users to determine if the access is appropriate.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor identifies two users in the marketing department who have administrator access to a financial server.

nodes.task_description: Recommend that the inappropriate access be revoked immediately.

expected_outcome.value: A high-priority finding is issued to the IT team.
